title: Emeline Shaw
summary: The Outcasts' leader, pursued from Roosevelt Island to a final confrontation at Manning National Zoo.

claims.text: Ubisoft's Episode 1 mission brief identifies Emeline Shaw as the leader of the Outcasts.
After her defeat on Roosevelt Island, Shaw retreats into Manning National Zoo and is protected by Outcast followers and blockades.

paragraphs.text: Shaw's retreat turns Manning National Zoo into an Outcast strongpoint and the site of the Division's next confrontation with the faction's leadership.

verification.notes: Origin and ideology claims await direct Outcast collectible evidence.
